narrative:
Center Township (precinct in Mercer County) has 789 registered voters, with 47.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.9 percentage points.
